title: 目標達成の後に・Open Horizon

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion tells me that she'd like to enter the
Queen Elizabeth II Cup. Apparently, she's had the
race on her mind since watching it on TV.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to use a prestigious race to express her
gratitude to everyone. Seeing how passionate she
is, I agree to make the Queen Elizabeth II Cup our
major objective.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After discussing which steps to take to get us
there, we decide to take on the Triple Tiara tour,
which is comprised of the Oka Sho, the Japanese
Oaks, and the Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's expectations soar as she imagines
what the view from such grand stages might
awaken in her. First up, we set our sights on the
Oka Sho!
